mapper.select:
SELECT prod_code, prod_name, unit FROM prod_common
WHERE prod_name LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'

SELECT proc_flow_code, prod_code, proc_code, FIND_PROD_NAME(prod_code) prod_name, proc_num, proc_name, note FROM proc_flow
WHERE prod_code LIKE '%'||#{prodCode}||'%'
ORDER BY proc_num
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'PF'||(NVL(MAX(order_num),0) + 1) AS proc_flow_code FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(proc_flow_code, 3)) AS order_num FROM proc_flow )
INSERT INTO proc_flow(proc_flow_code, proc_num, proc_code, proc_name, prod_code, note) VALUES (#{procFlowCode}, #{procNum}, #{procCode}, #{procName}, #{prodCode}, #{note})
